programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl thinks she is attending a lingerie party given by Andy's new girlfriend, then learns the hostess is selling sex toys.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim learns that his neighbor (Julie Newmar) has written a series of children's books, modeling a grumpy old man on him.

programme.title: X-Men Origins: Wolverine
programme.desc: Seeking solace from his dark past, Logan (Hugh Jackman), better known as Wolverine, seems to have found love and contentment with Kayla Silverfox (Lynn Collins). Logan's peaceful existence is shattered when Victor Creed (Liev Schreiber), his vicious brother, brutally murders Kayla. Logan's thirst for revenge propels him into the Weapon X program, where he undergoes a painful procedure to bond his bones with adamantium, making him virtually indestructible and more than a match for Victor.

programme.title: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: Transported to an alternate universe, four young outsiders gain superhuman powers as they alter their physical form in shocking ways. Reed Richards becomes Mr. Fantastic, able to stretch and twist his body at will, while pal Ben Grimm gains immense strength as the Thing. Johnny Storm becomes the Human Torch, able to control and project fire, while his sister Sue becomes the Invisible Woman. Together, the team must harness their new abilities to prevent Doctor Doom from destroying the Earth.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Two years ago, retired CIA agent Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) used his "particular set of skills" to rescue his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace), from kidnappers. Since then, Kim has been learning self-defense from her father, and Bryan has been on a personal mission to reunite with his ex-wife (Famke Janssen). In Istanbul, Bryan and his family cross paths with Murad (Rade Serbedzija), whose son died at Bryan's hand during Kim's rescue. Murad wants revenge, and he'll stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Ex-covert operative Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) and his ex-wife, Lenore (Famke Janssen), are enjoying a reconciliation when Lenore is brutally murdered. Bryan is framed for the crime and flees, with the CIA, FBI and police all in hot pursuit. For the last time, he channels his rage and particular set of skills into hunting down Lenore's real killers, taking his revenge and protecting the one important thing left in his life: his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace).

programme.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
programme.desc: When Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.) jump-starts a dormant peacekeeping program, things go terribly awry, forcing him, Thor (Chris Hemsworth), the Incredible Hulk (Mark Ruffalo) and the rest of the Avengers to reassemble. As the fate of Earth hangs in the balance, the team is put to the ultimate test as they battle Ultron, a technological terror hell-bent on human extinction. Along the way, they encounter two mysterious and powerful newcomers, Pietro and Wanda Maximoff.

programme.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, a woman who lives by herself in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina becomes the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal many secrets.

programme.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, a woman who lives by herself in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina becomes the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal many secrets.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: Belgian sleuth Hercule Poirot's Egyptian vacation aboard a glamorous river steamer turns into a terrifying search for a murderer when a picture-perfect couple's idyllic honeymoon is tragically cut short.

programme.title: Quintet
programme.desc: A frozen wasteland is the scene of an unusual game of life or death where the victims fight to remain alive.

programme.title: Champagne Charlie
programme.desc: A young heiress (Helen Wood) becomes the prime suspect in the murder of a smooth gambler (Paul Cavanagh).

programme.title: The Horror of It All
programme.desc: Yankee salesman Jack (Pat Boone) wants to marry Cynthia Marley (Erica Rogers), and they travel to her family's English estate to break the good news. Cynthia warns that the family is a bit odd, which proves to be an understatement. One relative is an ex-thespian who still believes he's in a play, another behaves like a vampire and a third is imprisoned in the cellar due to his violent tendencies. But things get really sinister when the Marleys start succumbing to violent fates, one by one.

programme.title: The Lodger
programme.desc: In London in 1889, retiree Robert Burton (Cedric Hardwicke) and his wife, Ellen (Sara Allgood), rent a spare room to the mysterious Slade (Laird Cregar) as Jack the Ripper continues to terrorize the city. The Burtons' niece, Kitty (Merle Oberon), is a music hall singer who initially grows fond of the eccentric lodger, but, when the Ripper's body count rises, she and a Scotland Yard inspector (George Sanders) gradually begin to suspect that Slade could be the notorious Whitechapel killer.

programme.title: Where the Sidewalk Ends
programme.desc: Ashamed that his father lived a life of crime, hard-boiled New York City cop Mark Dixon has a reputation for being too tough on criminals. So when Dixon unintentionally kills a murder suspect during a routine questioning, he hides the fact from the department and tries to pin the killing on his nemesis, notorious gangster Scalise. The snag in the cop's plan comes when his boss wrongly accuses the father of Dixon's love interest, Morgan, of the murder.

programme.title: Black Widow
programme.desc: At a party, Broadway producer Peter Denver (Van Heflin) meets Nancy Ordway (Peggy Ann Garner), a young writer struggling to make it in New York City. Taking pity on her, Denver offers Nancy his apartment as a place to write while his wife, Iris (Gene Tierney), is away. Shortly after, Nancy is found dead in his bathroom, apparently murdered, and Denver is, of course, the main suspect. As rumors swirl about his involvement with Nancy, Denver decides to search for her killer himself.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley
programme.desc: Roustabout Stanton Carlisle joins a traveling carny and unsuccessfully schemes to figure out the mind-reading act of Mademoiselle Zeena and her alcoholic husband, Pete. But when Pete dies, Zeena is forced to take on Stanton as a partner, and he quickly proves more gifted than his predecessor. Ambitious to a fault, Carlisle abandons Zeena and the carny to reinvent himself as The Great Stanton, wowing high-class audiences in a Chicago hotel.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: When her mother disappears while on vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June's search for answers is hindered by international red tape. Stuck thousands of miles away in Los Angeles, June creatively uses all the latest technology at her fingertips to try and find her before it's too late. However, as she digs ever deeper, her digital sleuthing soon raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Antebellum
programme.desc: Successful author Veronica Henley is finishing a book tour before she returns home to her husband and daughter. But a shocking turn of events is about to upend Veronica's existence, plunging her into a horrifying reality that forces her to confront her past, present and future -- before it's too late.

programme.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
programme.desc: Working in the shadow of his father, Detective Ezekiel "Zeke" Banks and his rookie partner take charge of an investigation into grisly murders that are eerily reminiscent of the city's gruesome past. Unwittingly entrapped in a deepening mystery, Zeke finds himself at the center of the killer's morbid game.

programme.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
programme.desc: Working in the shadow of his father, Detective Ezekiel "Zeke" Banks and his rookie partner take charge of an investigation into grisly murders that are eerily reminiscent of the city's gruesome past. Unwittingly entrapped in a deepening mystery, Zeke finds himself at the center of the killer's morbid game.

programme.title: Antebellum
programme.desc: Successful author Veronica Henley is finishing a book tour before she returns home to her husband and daughter. But a shocking turn of events is about to upend Veronica's existence, plunging her into a horrifying reality that forces her to confront her past, present and future -- before it's too late.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: When her mother disappears while on vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June's search for answers is hindered by international red tape. Stuck thousands of miles away in Los Angeles, June creatively uses all the latest technology at her fingertips to try and find her before it's too late. However, as she digs ever deeper, her digital sleuthing soon raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: The Egyptian
programme.desc: In ancient Egypt, Sinuhe (Edmund Purdom) is a would-be doctor who saves the life of a young man (Michael Wilding) suffering from a seizure. When the afflicted youth awakes, he introduces himself as the Pharaoh Akhnaton and makes Sinuhe the royal healer. While working at his new, prestigious post, Sinuhe suffers through a botched romance and the death of his adoptive parents. Despondent, he leaves the Pharaoh's court to bury his loved ones, and, in the process, incurs the wrath of Akhnaton.

programme.title: The Black Rose
programme.desc: Following the 13th-century death of his nobleman father, Walter of Gurnie (Tyrone Power) and his confidant, Tristram (Jack Hawkins), join a caravan led by the North African Bayan (Orson Welles) en route to China. Along the way, the beautiful Maryam (Cecile Aubry), known as the Black Rose, begs Walter to take her to England with him. When the warlord Bayan reveals his intention to invade and subjugate China's advanced society, the trio attempt their escape back to England.

programme.title: The Ox-Bow Incident
programme.desc: In this classic Western, wanderers Gil Carter (Henry Fonda) and Art Croft (Henry Morgan) ride into a small Nevada town plagued by cattle thieves. Initially suspected of being the rustlers themselves, Carter and Croft eventually join a posse out to get the criminals, who also may be involved in a recent shooting. When the posse closes in on a group that could be the fugitives, they must decide on a course of action, with numerous lives hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Hombre
programme.desc: John Russell finds that the world is not so welcoming when he returns to his Arizona hometown to collect his inheritance. A white man raised by American Indians, Russell is subjected to numerous instances of racism when people discover his background. When the stagecoach Russell is riding in is held up by a gang run by one of the scheming passengers, Cicero Grimes, it falls to Russell to defend the passengers -- the very people who have dismissed and insulted him.

programme.title: Bandolero!
programme.desc: There is little hope for bandit Dee Bishop (Dean Martin) and his gang as they wait to be hanged. But at the last second, the hangman -- Dee's brother, Mace (James Stewart), in disguise -- helps them escape. After kidnapping a rancher's wife (Raquel Welch) and with the vengeful sheriff (George Kennedy) in pursuit, they retreat to an abandoned town. Tired of their desperado life, the brothers consider going straight. But when a gang of bandoleros attacks, their chances at starting over seem dim.

programme.title: 100 Rifles
programme.desc: When half-breed Indian Yaqui Joe (Burt Reynolds) robs an Arizona bank, he is pursued by dogged lawman Lyedecker (Jim Brown). Fleeing to Mexico, Joe is imprisoned by General Verdugo (Fernando Lamas), who is waging a war against the Yaqui Indians. When Lyedecker attempts to intervene, he is thrown into prison as well. Working together, the two escape and take refuge in the hills, where Lyedecker meets beautiful Yaqui freedom fighter Sarita (Raquel Welch) and begins to question his allegiances.

programme.title: The Last Duel
programme.desc: Jean de Carrouges is a respected knight known for his bravery and skill on the battlefield. Jacques Le Gris is a squire whose intelligence and eloquence makes him one of the most admired nobles in court. When Le Gris viciously assaults Carrouges' wife, she steps forward to accuse her attacker, an act of bravery and defiance that puts her life in jeopardy. The ensuing trial by combat, a grueling duel to the death, places the fate of all three in God's hands.

programme.title: The French Dispatch
programme.desc: A love letter to journalists set in an outpost of an American newspaper in a fictional 20th-century French city that brings to life a collection of stories published in "The French Dispatch.".

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: Jojo is a lonely German boy who discovers that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their attic. Aided only by his imaginary friend -- Adolf Hitler -- Jojo must confront his blind nationalism as World War II continues to rage on.

programme.title: The French Dispatch
programme.desc: A love letter to journalists set in an outpost of an American newspaper in a fictional 20th-century French city that brings to life a collection of stories published in "The French Dispatch.".

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: Jojo is a lonely German boy who discovers that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their attic. Aided only by his imaginary friend -- Adolf Hitler -- Jojo must confront his blind nationalism as World War II continues to rage on.

programme.title: Young Frankenstein
programme.desc: Respected medical lecturer Dr. Frederick Frankenstein (Gene Wilder) learns that he has inherited his infamous grandfather's estate in Transylvania. Arriving at the castle, Dr. Frankenstein soon begins to recreate his grandfather's experiments with the help of servants Igor (Marty Feldman), Inga (Teri Garr) and the fearsome Frau Blücher (Cloris Leachman). After he creates his own monster (Peter Boyle), new complications ensue with the arrival of the doctor's fiancée, Elizabeth (Madeline Kahn).

programme.title: The Earth Dies Screaming
programme.desc: An astronaut (Willard Parker) returns from a test flight to find England overtaken by alien-controlled robots which turn corpses into zombies.

programme.title: Soup to Nuts
programme.desc: Two guys and a girl run into Mexican rebels and lots of fires.

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
programme.desc: Lorelei Lee (Marilyn Monroe) is a beautiful showgirl engaged to be married to the wealthy Gus Esmond (Tommy Noonan), much to the disapproval of Gus' rich father, Esmond Sr., who thinks that Lorelei is just after his money. When Lorelei goes on a cruise accompanied only by her best friend, Dorothy Shaw (Jane Russell), Esmond Sr. hires Ernie Malone (Elliott Reid), a private detective, to follow her and report any questionable behavior that would disqualify her from the marriage.

programme.title: Carmen Jones
programme.desc: Screen version of the musical Carmen Jones, which adapted Bizet's opera Carmen for an African-American cast. A soldier falls for Dandridge, a seductive factory worker. The lovers flee after the soldier kills his sergeant, but Carmen's taunting faithlessness drives her lover to a crime of passion.

programme.title: Can-Can
programme.desc: Parisian nightclub owner Simone Pistache (Shirley MacLaine) is known for her performances of the can-can, a provocative dance recently outlawed for being immoral. Though her dancing delights patrons to no end, it also attracts the ire of the self-righteous Judge Philippe Forrestier (Louis Jourdan), who aims to punish her. The judge hatches a plot to photograph Simone in the act and ends up falling for her -- much to the chagrin of her boyfriend, handsome lawyer François Durnais (Frank Sinatra).

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A celebration of love and creative inspiration takes place in the infamous, gaudy and glamorous Parisian nightclub, at the cusp of the 20th century. A young poet (Ewan McGregor), who is plunged into the heady world of Moulin Rouge, begins a passionate affair with the club's most notorious and beautiful star (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Love at first sight strikes when young Tony spots Maria at a high school dance in 1957 New York City. Their burgeoning romance helps to fuel the fire between the warring Jets and Sharks -- two rival gangs vying for control of the streets.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, down-on-his-luck Stanton Carlisle endears himself to a clairvoyant and her mentalist husband at a traveling carnival. Using newly acquired knowledge, Carlisle crafts a golden ticket to success by swindling the elite and wealthy. Hoping for a big score, he soon hatches a scheme to con a dangerous tycoon with help from a mysterious psychologist who might be his most formidable opponent yet.

programme.title: The Toy (1982)
programme.desc: Remake of the Pierre Richard comedy LE JOUET with Pryor as a penniless writer hired by zillionaire Gleason as plaything for spoiled son Schwartz. Gleason tells his son he can have any present he wants and the son picks the most outrageous gift of all--Richard Pryor.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: A terrific ensemble cast takes reading the classics to new heights of passion in this charming romantic comedy.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: Jumping The Broom
programme.desc: A collision of worlds when two African-American families from divergent socioeconomic backgrounds get together one weekend in Martha's Vineyard for a wedding.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: Dick Harper's (Jim Carrey) years of hard work finally pay off when he is promoted to vice president at Glabodyne, a world leader in the consolidation of media properties. But after exactly one day on his new job, Glabodyne is destroyed by an Enron-like calamity and he is left holding the bag. Dick's sudden reversal of fortune has left him little time to set aside money for a rainy day. After playing by the rules and working single-mindedly to build a comfortable life for his family, Dick is utterly unprepared to give up on the American dream. Taking a lesson from his corrupt employer, Dick hits on a brilliant idea: If stealing is good enough for his boss, then it's good enough for him. Using his new found skills, he and Jane exact hilarious revenge and teach big business a lesson.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: Dick Harper's (Jim Carrey) years of hard work finally pay off when he is promoted to vice president at Glabodyne, a world leader in the consolidation of media properties. But after exactly one day on his new job, Glabodyne is destroyed by an Enron-like calamity and he is left holding the bag. Dick's sudden reversal of fortune has left him little time to set aside money for a rainy day. After playing by the rules and working single-mindedly to build a comfortable life for his family, Dick is utterly unprepared to give up on the American dream. Taking a lesson from his corrupt employer, Dick hits on a brilliant idea: If stealing is good enough for his boss, then it's good enough for him. Using his new found skills, he and Jane exact hilarious revenge and teach big business a lesson.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product, a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: At Home In Mitford
programme.desc: An attractive writer with writer’s block who hasn’t quite gotten over her recent divorce soon discovers the idyllic village she used to visit in her youth might just be the place to help recover.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: At Home In Mitford
programme.desc: An attractive writer with writer’s block who hasn’t quite gotten over her recent divorce soon discovers the idyllic village she used to visit in her youth might just be the place to help recover.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: How Do You Know?
programme.desc: Feeling a bit past her prime at 27, former athlete Lisa Jorgenson finds herself in the middle of a love triangle, as a corporate guy in crisis competes with Lisa's current, baseball-playing beau.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.
Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.

programme.sub-title: A Daughter Is A Precious Thing
programme.desc: When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and "man-wise" neighbor.

Young Calvin's unemployment has gotten everyone at "227" so concerned that "always-involved" Mary badgers husband Lester into hiring him--but when Lester is forced to fire the awkward teenager, the residents explode.

After Mary's refrigerator breaks down, her sly and opportunistic neighbor Sandra readily agrees to use her "influence" on their stingy landlord to get her a new one--in exchange for Mary lending her apartment to Sandra for one of her "small gatherings."

Mary Jenkins (series star Marla Gibbs), the irrepressible meddler and protector of "227," an aging apartment building, gives honesty a beating after she backs into a neighbor's parked car and then calls upon her "man-wise" nemesis Sandra (Jackée) to use her feminine wiles to calm the handsome man's anger. Mary's problems are further fueled when the unwitting owner's car is destroyed by a hit and run driver, leaving Mary's apology note the only recognizable feature on the expensive vehicle. This forces her to reluctantly press her luck by asking the crafty Sandra to lure the man's attentions away from pressing charges of his own.
Mary fires Cupid's arrow at her brother Lewis and best friend Rose, but she misses the mark when Lewis sets his own sights on resident vamp Sandra.
Brenda's genealogy assignment triggers a war between her mother Mary and neighbor Sandra over famous ancestors--but Mary's pride soon goes AWOL when she learns her family tree has root rot.

Both Mary and Sandra get a different view of womanhood when housewife Mary attempts to rekindle lost love by "steppin' out" with husband Lester, while party-happy Sandra is homebound with her six-year-old niece for the weekend.
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Kelly becomes a prima donna after being asked to fill in on a popular children's television program.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part I)
programme.desc: A party game sends Al and Peggy to a marriage counselor; Kelly squares off in the boxing ring against a rival actress.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part II)
programme.desc: When Al moves out, he and Peggy throw themselves into the singles scene, with widely different results.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part III)
programme.desc: While Al finds single life dismal, Peggy tries to land a new husband.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: As Jefferson's worries about getting old force him into taking a job, Al tries to cure Peggy's shopping addiction.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al sells his soul for a chance to play in the Super Bowl.

programme.desc: Al and Griff trade the shoe store's inventory for a massage chair.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al strikes up a friendship with Marcy's identical cousin.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's prison pen pal arrives to rob the Bundys.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al objects to Kelly marrying an armed robber, until he discovers that he's the heir to a family fortune.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: At the suggestion of her next-door-neighbor Marcy, Peggy goes on a "thinergy" diet in hopes of rekindling the flame in Al.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Sixteen Years And What Do You Get?
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Al, Peggy runs his credit card up to the limit and Al is forced to show up for his sixteenth wedding anniversary empty-handed.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: But I Didn't Shoot The Deputy
programme.desc: Like any red-blooded American, when Al hears a strange sound in the night, he springs to the defense of his home and family and accidentally shoots the neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Have You Driven A Ford Lately?
programme.desc: After Al and Steve restore a '65 Mustang to its former glory, Marcy and Steve can't resist giving it a test run - from the back seat.

programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
programme.desc: Former MMA superstar agrees to train a fighter for the match of a lifetime in Thailand.

programme.title: Black and Blue (2019)
programme.desc: After capturing crooked cops killing drug dealers on her body cam, a female rookie must evade the narcotics officers who are after the incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: Lee Gates, a bombastic television stock huckster, is taken hostage on his TV show by an outraged gunman. As much of the world watches live, Gates must keep himself alive and, with help from the woman who produces the show, uncover the truth behind a tangle of big money lies.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four friends made a pact to conceal a shocking secret. But now, someone has learned the truth.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

programme.title: Money Monster

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon, the Accident Man, is a stone cold killer, he is the best at what he does. But when a loved one is dragged into the London underworld and murdered by his own crew, Fallon is forced to rip apart the life he knew in order to avenge the one person who actually meant something to him.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Suspect (1987)
programme.desc: This tension-filled courtroom drama opens with the suicide of a Supreme Court justice. Then the young Justice Department employee to whom he had given privileged information is discovered dead. A deaf-mute Vietnam veteran is charged with her murder and Cher, a public defender, is appointed counsel.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick and Burton square off over the hiring of a new partner, a new client's custody case leads James to conclude that he beat up the wrong man in retaliation for his nephew Levi's murder.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick struggles with the possibility of Lulu leaving and James wrestles with his guilt over having beaten the wrong man, Burton is forced into a custody battle with Shannon's estranged father.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick is assigned to represent the son of a sideshow performer who has accused the carnival's owner of molesting him; Burton looks to ease his conscience by tracking down the man he and Nick assaulted.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: The accident that has Lulu fighting for her life teams Nick with the autistic child boy of the other car's driver.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Burton defends a police officer in an unprovoked shooting, Nick's probation comes under investigation as he tries to decide which of three teenage clients he will save from being sent to a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick and Burton help an ex-con regain custody of his son and resume his boxing career, Lulu and Jake pursue a lawsuit on behalf of a teenage girl who was caught performing a sex act on board a school bus.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick's legal work on behalf of a big coal operator puts his loyalties to the test when he discovers that a teenage girl's cancer is a result of his client's negligence.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick represents a teenaged prostitute whose pimp specializes in young girls; the pending sale of a family's department store is threatened by an alleged shoplifter's accusations of racial profiling.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick is asked by a recovering drug addict to help regain custody of his blind twelve-year-old daughter; a longtime client's lawsuit against a fertility clinic exposes an extramarital affair.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A young LSP's client's case exposes a secret that Jake is keeping from Nick and the firm; Lulu tries to avoid any contact with her estranged father.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick cautions Lulu against getting involved with her dad, Jake is asked to help with his parent's divorce.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As a former client looks to Nick to help him get his life back on track, Burton sets out to adopt Shannon.

programme.desc: As Nick tries to find a home for a pair of AIDS orphans, Alvin helps the head of an AIDS charity in her battle with Burton over an elderly man's estate.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Following his uncle’s mysterious death, Alex Rider begins a quest for answers that leads him into a dark world of secrets and espionage. He comes to realise that his uncle wasn’t the man he thought he was – and that Alex himself is expected to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex is thrown into the unfamiliar world of the ultra-rich as he struggles to perfect his cover identity, but risks alienating his best friend Tom by keeping the mission a secret.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As his covert investigation of Point Blanc gets underway, Alex discovers that he’s been left vulnerable. The Department seem to be closing in on the double-agent in their ranks – but the killer Yassen gets there first.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Appalled to realise that the students in Point Blanc are being mysteriously changed by Doctor Greif, Alex enlists Kyra and James in a plan to escape. Blunt spearheads an investigation into Parker Roscoe.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Tom lands in the crosshairs of the conspiracy behind Ian Rider’s murder, Alex and Kyra find evidence of Dr. Greif’s secret plan.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex leads a Special Forces squad back inside Point Blanc in a stealth mission to rescue his friends and stop Greif’s plans.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: The Department finally solve the mystery of Ian’s death and realise that an old, lethal enemy has resurfaced – while Alex faces off against his own duplicate in a desperate battle to save the people he loves.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Any One of Us
programme.desc: An unprecedented glimpse into the world of spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: I Can Be President: A Kid's-Eye View
programme.desc: Children's ideas about the presidency.

programme.title: Miss You Can Do It
programme.desc: Abbey Curran, the first woman with cerebral palsy to compete in a Miss USA Pageant, creates a pageant specifically for girls with special needs.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Lola Versus
programme.desc: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: I Am Not a Monster: The Lois Riess Murders
programme.desc: After David Riess is found dead, a disturbing psychological portrait of his wife and accused killer Lois emerges.

programme.title: I Am Not a Monster: The Lois Riess Murders
programme.desc: After Pamela Hutchinson's body is discovered in Florida, a nationwide manhunt for the "Killer Grandma" begins.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
programme.desc: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

programme.title: 38 at the Garden
programme.desc: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: Norm of the North
programme.desc: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

programme.title: Larry Kramer in Love and Anger
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jean Carlomusto examines the life of Larry Kramer, playwright, author and activist for gay rights.

programme.title: Breslin and Hamill: Deadline Artists
programme.desc: The lives and careers of journalists Jimmy Breslin and Pete Hamill.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project
programme.desc: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. The countdown for the legendary party Scousechella is on and the whole school scrambles to get tickets, Christopher struggles with the anniversary of his mother's passing away as a misunderstanding about the next steps in his relationship with Aimee threatens their bond, and Reece wrestles with feelings of irrelevance given that both Connor and his mum seem to be moving on without him. Scousechella itself lives up to its hype and wild reputation, but things take a turn back at the school when a mysterious hacker named Ye Ma leaks footage from the party and reveals uncomfortable truths about relationships and consent - involving Reece, Aimee, Connor and Lauren - that leaves friendships and reputations hanging by a thread.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. Mia-Louise heads to a gaming expo where she unexpectedly comes face to face with her online partner James and the gap in age between them is finally revealed, and Connor finds himself at the centre of a school scandal when he is accused of sexually assaulting Lauren at Scousechella - meanwhile, Lauren struggles to reclaim her voice about what happened while everyone else showcases theirs, and especially in the case of The Brimble who escalates the drama and tensions with a podcast on consent. After Lauren finally confronts Connor and reveals truths about their relationship that clarify events at the party, the pair find closure and a friendship moving forward - elsewhere, Christopher struggles with jealousy over Aimee and Reece's kiss at the party and is offered support by Jodie, and Mia-Louise's relationship with James takes a turn when she makes an impulsive visit to his flat.

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson writes and narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe - the programme takes viewers on a tour of record-breaking sequences, celebrating the people who have striven to find fame by using their own individual talents to set one of the renowned Guinness World Records. It showcases some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts and includes interviews with some of the biggest characters from the world of record-breaking - from the fastest dog on two wheels to the longest fingernails in the US, this fun-packed series reveals some of the most extraordinary humans and amazing animals to be found on Planet Earth and is also jammed with the key facts and statistics for each record attempt and the people involved. In this episode, Matt highlights Japanese skipping dogs, the quickest 100-metre moonwalk, and the dog with the longest tongue in the world.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 23-year-old Dianne Price is found drowned in her bath, wrapped in net curtains, and made to look like a bride with a ring on her finger, a bouquet of cheap flowers on a toilet seat, and a chilling message written in lipstick on the bathroom mirror - Barnaby and Jones begin their investigation and find no shortage of possible culprits. While Barnaby ponders the similarity of the case to a string of murders from 1912, Jones struggles with his new boss's love of psychology - the case then leads the detectives to a donkey sanctuary and a pub run by an ex-copper and former madam. When local vet Fran Carter is murdered at a heritage steam railway site - and her body decorated with confetti - Barnaby finds parallels with another decades-old case... could history be repeating itself? It is not long before there are more shocking deaths, and Barnaby and Jones must work fast if they are to catch the killer before it is too late.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Drama based on the novel by Ann Cleeves. After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama series. Battle-scarred from their conflict during the last series, Rachel and Janet are determined to move forward. Scott and Bailey find themselves in front of the promotions board being interviewed for the post of sergeant; when both pass with flying colours, DCI Gill Murray has to choose which of them gets the job at Syndicate Nine. Meanwhile, the team's latest case involves the abduction and possible murder of vulnerable young man Robin McKendrick. When a photo of Robin gagged and bound in the boot of a car appears on Facebook, Syndicate Nine suspect that he is already dead. A lead takes the team to a local quarry where they expect to find Robin's remains, but when the divers are called in, the body they find is that of a young woman...

At the local pub, Barnaby hears various conspiracy theories about how the Lamberts met their death - their lawyer reveals that her clients withdrew thousands of pounds from their account supposedly for gambling and also gave them advice about the use of a promissory note. While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. Can Barnaby and Jones find out who killed the owners of Malham Hall and if the case has a link to the missing woman?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. When a woman is found killed in a remote cottage in the dramatic Northumberland countryside, DI Vera Stanhope is taken back to a place full of childhood memories and an unsolved case from her own past. She and her team delve into the local politics surrounding a controversial proposal to dig a new quarry and find motives for murder in the unlikeliest of places. As they uncover further shadowy liaisons and conflicting sympathies, the police come to realise that the truth could be hidden within the land itself.

programme.title: Lewis

programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Gill introduces her new sergeant to Will Pemberton, an ambitious detective superintendent on his way to the top. However, Rachel and Will have been enjoying a passionate yet discreet affair for the past few months; Will wants to go public, but Rachel would prefer to keep it quiet as she is worried about how others might judge her. Inspired by Eleanor's happy home life, Janet determines to persevere with the dating game, but a speed dating evening proves a disaster when she realises that she is unable to step out of character and has been interviewing every man there as if he was a suspect. The latest case involves the murder of a woman in a Manchester hotel; with only a necklace and the name Lola to go on, Syndicate Nine try to piece together her last known movements. When a witness comes forward to report a troubling sexual encounter, it seems that a hook-up site could hold the answers.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The Isle of Man is in the throes of a fortnight like no other - the three-wheelers are moving heaven and earth to achieve their dreams and flinging themselves from apex to apex to break lap records. From brothers in arms honing machinery to thrills and spills, there's pelvic pain and medical hurdles to overcome - however, the sidecar roster is a hardy breed of men and women who stare fear in the eye and let fear blink first.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and the Contessa discover a beautiful blonde who has run away from home and earns her money by passing on mysterious messages full of seemingly random numbers.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The stakes are higher than ever in the BattleBots VII World Championship qualifiers as Claw Viper and Overhaul grapple to defend their undefeated records and fan favourite Mammoth looks to launch Starchild into orbit in a battle of behemoths.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A woman hires Thomas to find her father who disappeared while sailing in a mysterious stretch of ocean shrouded in Hawaiian superstition.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Rick falls in love with a beautiful woman that he meets on the beach - the woman, however, turns out to have been murdered 40 years ago. Magnum must investigate the case and prove that Rick isn't seeing a ghost while tracking down the woman's killer.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry is feeling so low that he answers a lonely hearts ad in the local newspaper and seriously contemplates selling the Coaching Inn - as Ken meets with a former lover at an aerobics class, a hostage situation develops elsewhere.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The final episode of the classic '70s police drama series. Regan is behaving with his usual disregard for authority when he finds himself in deep trouble after an old allegation of corruption rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur announces the launch of Daley Into Space with typical aplomb and hopes to corner the market in satellite dishes, but his phobia of all matters technical and nephew Ray's interest in a dish of his own - namely the daughter of a customer - results in chaos of Arthurian proportions.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Aragon Round as the 5.344km track at MotorLand Aragon pushes the riders to their limits as they look to get points on the board.

programme.title: World Rally Highlights
programme.desc: Round Seven of the 2026 World Rally Championship is the Rally of Japan. Stages are narrow and twisty, often lined by barriers, drop-offs or dense trees. [S]

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: Supersport 1: Supersport racing showcases the TT at its most technical, where rhythm, precision and racecraft matter more than outright horsepower. [S]

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: Something unexpected at sea surprises those on the raft. The remaining islanders try to open the hatch, and a visitor to the camp could be a threat to Claire's son.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The BattleBots VII World Championship qualifiers are red hot as rookie robot Horizon tries for its first win of the season against British mauler Monsoon and the world's two best hammerbots go weapon to weapon when the UK's Beta takes on Shatter - elsewhere, the beautiful but deadly crushing machine Quantum tries to pierce the armour of Brazil's Black Dragon, and there is a Main Event that is so violent that it could bring down the roof when the UK's Cobalt meets the Brazilian Bull Minotaur in the BattleBox for the first time since an epic showdown in the fourth series.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Preview Show
programme.desc: South Africa, Algeria, Tunisia and Ghana - this episode follows four nations rebuilding through heritage, pride and generational change.

programme.desc: Action from round 17 in the Gallagher Prem, featuring Bristol v Bath, Saracens v Harlequins, Northampton v Gloucester, Newcastle v Sale and Leicester v Exeter. [S]

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road and trawling Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics to restore and sell on for a tidy profit - this time they're in Stafford with a stall full of bikes and trinkets they've picked up in Hereford and Whitstable.

programme.desc: Classic drama series about a freelance troubleshooter. An engineer devises a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, but will Simon Templar be a guinea pig in the icy experiment?

programme.title: Boon
